title: Indian Style Omelette Wrap
description: A delicious, crispy Indian-inspired omelette wrapped in a tasty wrap. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together. Add flax and mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add garlicky for extra flavor.
Pour the egg mixture into the pan and cook until the eggs start to set.
Use a spatula to gently fold the omelette in half.
Cook for another minute and then slide the omelette onto a plate.
Warm the wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Place the omelette onto the wrap and serve hot.
Fold the wrap to enclose the omelette and serve immediately.
